markdown:
# Potion of Mind Reading

- **Type**: P|XPHB
- **Weight**: 0.5 lb.

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the [[detect_thoughts Thoughts]] spell (save DC 13) for 10 minutes (no Concentration required).

This potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.
